name: English Sweet and Sour Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from short ribs.
2. Combine flour, seasoned salt and pepper; dredge the short ribs.
3. Brown ribs in oil on all sides in a Dutch oven.
4. Remove meat from pan.
5. Add onions and cook until golden brown.
6. Place ribs on top of onions.
7. Combine water, brown sugar, catsup, vinegar, garlic, and bay leaves; pour over ribs.
8. Cover and bake in moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 2 1/2 hours.
9. Remove bay leaves before serving.
